5197aa26303031741500164a_2.t: There is a hungry glint in Jessica’s eyes.

5197aa26303031741500164a_4.t: My darling girl, you misunderstand. What we offer is eternal life. A chance to be part of a new...
Jessica suddenly notices you and her words fail in her throat.

5197aa26303031741500164a_15.t: But first, I think it's time you met my new family. They're eager to make your acquaintance.

519d49c7303031ec15004919_0.t: Jessica appears to be in the throes of a violent trance or mild seizure. A manic state brought on by the terrible energies she is attempting to conduct.
stop! The Queen... approaches! The vessel... The summoning... We... cannot... be... disturbed!

519d49c7303031ec15004919_6.t: When Jessica speaks next, her eyes have a disturbing sharpness. Her words are echoed by Lynne in a manner that suggests a connection beyond their shared zealotry.
The Hive has no thought beyond hunger, no goal beyond reproduction. We are one.

519d49c7303031ec15004919_7.t: Jessica's body then suddenly spasms, arching her back and nearly lifting her off her feet. She lets loose a scream falling somewhere between elation and agony.

519d49c7303031ec15004919_8.t: This seems to throw her off.

519d49c7303031ec15004919_11.t: The hum of magical energy permeating the room seems to quiet. She's listening.

519d49c7303031ec15004919_13.t: I... I had to. For what he did... what he had become.

519d49c7303031ec15004919_16.t: Jessica falls quiet. She bows her head.

51a259bc303031740f00682d_0.t: The once-beautiful Jessica Watts is a hollow shell of her former self. Her skin is pale, her lips are ashen, and her eyes are sunken in her skull. It is more than her body’s reaction to the physical damage she’s sustained or the strain of channeling magical power from another plane of existence. There is something missing from her now.

51a259bc303031740f00682d_2.t: She shakes her head weakly, her body slumped as if it might fold itself into the ground.
You... you don't understand... There are nests everywhere... in every major city. It is only a matter of time...

51a259bc303031740f00682d_3.t: Oh God. What have I done?

51a259bc303031740f00682d_5.t: She hugs herself and begins shaking uncontrollably, little cries of anguish and despair escaping her chest.
I know... I... I will to go to Hell for this... if I still have a soul at all. I betrayed humanity...

51a259bc303031740f00682d_6.t: Her tear-streaked face freezes with a sudden realization.
Oh God... The other nests... They're in every major city... What have we done?

51a259bc303031740f00682d_7.t: She bows her head and closes her eyes, forcing a torrent of tears to cascade down her cheeks.
I wish that were true... but there’s no hope for me now. There’s no hope for anyone.

51a259bc303031740f00682d_8.t: She opens her eyes and there is nothing but hopelessness within.
There is a nest like this in every major city. There's no stopping them. Oh God...

51a25bb1303031740f006849_0.t: Please. Don’t let them... don’t let them eat me!

51a25bb1303031740f006849_3.t: She lowers her head in shame.

51ae5da2303031e014007184_0.t: At a glance, you can tell that Sam’s sister Jessica is from a different world - the opposite of Sam in almost every way. Her suit is tailored, her eyes are sharp, and her style exudes authority.

51ae5da2303031e014007184_1.t: She eyes you up and down warily. She does a good job of hiding it, but it is clear that she is well outside of her comfort zone.

51ae5da2303031e014007184_4.t: She briefly casts her eyes skyward, then gives a small shake of her head.
I wish I could say it's a shock. But given the circles he ran in...

51ae5da2303031e014007184_10.t: She then furrows her brow, regarding you more critically.
You're not with the police, are you?

51ae5da2303031e014007184_11.t: No. It's just that... I don't want anyone else getting hurt on account of my brother.

51ae5da2303031e014007184_14.t: Someone's paying you? I find it hard to believe that anyone who really knew Sam would put up the money. Who is it?

51ae5da2303031e014007184_16.t: Am I to believe that my drunken sot of a brother hired you to find the person who killed him *after* he died?
Her boardroom mask drops momentarily, and in a sigh, she reveals a brief glimpse of real emotion.
I left Seattle to get away from Sam and his bullshit. Now I’m back, he’s dead, and I *still* have to deal with him.

51ae5da2303031e014007184_17.t: Jessica composes herself, and in a breath, the mask is back in place.

Listen to me. You seem like a decent person. But I’m trying to move on with my life. Our mother killed herself last year and Sam... Well, Sam was Sam. You know? I’ve worked so hard to put my family issues behind me. I don't want to see this drag on.

51ae5da2303031e014007184_23.t: Nevermind. I can see that you are not going to let this go and I respect that you are honoring my brother’s memory - in your own way. But I hope you can understand how emotional this is for me.

51ae5da2303031e014007184_24.t: Jessica's demeanor instantly changes, from reluctant to helpful in the span of a single meditative breath.
Maybe you can do things in a way that the police can’t. And maybe I can help. What do you need from me?

51ae5da2303031e014007184_35.t: Jessica takes the photo from you guardedly, as if it might sting her. But that guard drops the moment she looks at it.
Where... where did you find this?

51ae5da2303031e014007184_37.t: She studies the old photo for several silent moments.

51ae5da2303031e014007184_40.t: Then, after our father died, things began to change. And we couldn't get back to a new normal. With our dad around, there was always a reassuring order to our lives. But after, everything got mixed up. You can never really appreciate the importance of a person in your life until they’re gone.
The remorse plays wet across her eyes, and it seems that she's not just talking about her father.

51ae5da2303031e014007184_41.t: Jessica then steels herself to tell the rest.

Sam tried to be “the man of the house”. He truly did. But he couldn't handle it, and pretty soon he had spent every dime of our father's life insurance. Every dime. After that was gone - with Mom working two, three jobs - he spent all her money, too. I couldn’t stand the way he abused her trust... so finally, I just had to leave.

51ae5da2303031e014007184_42.t: She holds the photo forward, one part of her ready to relinquish it along with the past and another looking to hold on to both.

51ae5da2303031e014007184_47.t: She smiles through a brief reverie.
We were twins. Partners in crime. Best friends.

51ae5da2303031e014007184_63.t: She scowls. An ugly expression on an otherwise pretty face.
This is just what I'm worried about. Such an attitude could jeopardize any real shot of solving this case.

51ae5da2303031e014007184_64.t: By the look on her face, she is clearly struggling with this.
I'll be honest. I would just as soon put this all behind me, and the fastest way to do that is through proper channels.

51ae5da2303031e014007184_67.t: She seems to instantly regret saying it.
I'm sorry. Look, I just want to understand what's going on here.

51ae5da2303031e014007184_73.t: She shakes free the thought and attempts a lukewarm smile.
So you're the one then? The one I was called about.

cd39d85d3030310c13002ce2_4.t: She opens her hands to the elf standing across from her.
Thank you for coming, Lynne. Your support has meant the world to me. Now, I can live again - with my new family.

cd39d85d3030310c13002ce2_6.t: Jessica speaks to the rest of you.
Thank you all for coming. I didn’t realize Sam had so many friends. I appreciate your support and your friendship with Sam.

cd39d85d3030310c13002ce2_11.t: She eyes you suspiciously, and glances over at her elven companion.
I suppose. But let's not keep Father O'Malley.

cd39d85d3030310c13002ce2_13.t: Her eyes widen at the edge in your voice.
I'm sure Father O'Malley doesn't appreciate such a tone on these grounds. Father, if you'll excuse us?

cd39d85d3030310c13002ce2_15.t: Very well. But let's not keep Father O'Malley.

d19d1d0d3030312c0c0072b3_2.t: Jessica's demeanor turns oddly cool and stony in response to such a simple question.

d19d1d0d3030312c0c0072b3_4.t: She wasn't a donor. She was a victim. A victim of my brother's greed. He took from her, desecrating her body, all to benefit himself. She never would have agreed to such a thing.

d19d1d0d3030312c0c0072b3_5.t: Cracks are starting to appear on Jessica's carefully crafted mask.
Sam destroyed his own liver pursuing oblivion. That was his choice.

d19d1d0d3030312c0c0072b3_7.t: Jessica's eyes burn with righteous anger. Gone are any attempts to hide her guilt.
Dr. Holmes made my mother whole again! He made it possible for me to place her to rest and say goodbye.

d19d1d0d3030312c0c0072b3_8.t: Those people were scavengers! Ghouls! They deserved to die for desecrating my mother’s body.

d19d1d0d3030312c0c0072b3_14.t: What happens now is on your head. If you had just walked away when I told you to. McKlusky would have eventually found Holmes, collected his lieutenant’s badge, and closed the case. But you had to keep DIGGING.

d19d1d0d3030312c0c0072b3_16.t: You watch her eyes harden at the mention of Dr. Holmes.
I have no idea what you mean.

d19d1d0d3030312c0c0072b3_17.t: Despite her words, her eyes say something altogether different.

d19d1d0d3030312c0c0072b3_19.t: Emotions race across the woman's face until it settles on a snarl of hatred.
No, you've got it all turned around. He USED her! He sold her for parts!

d19d1d0d3030312c0c0072b3_21.t: Jessica seems to choose her words carefully, due to the circumstances or the company.
No, but it doesn’t surprise me that he needed a new liver, considering his... lifestyle.

d19d1d0d3030312c0c0072b3_22.t: She flushes bright, marring her perfectly made up face.

d19d1d0d3030312c0c0072b3_24.t: I can't say that I have.

d19d1d0d3030312c0c0072b3_25.t: Jessica practically growls her words at you.

d19d1d0d3030312c0c0072b3_27.t: Jessica is taken aback, or she's poising herself to bolt.
She... she was nothing of the sort.

d19d1d0d3030312c0c0072b3_28.t: One can't be a donor when they have no say in the matter. Those butchers robbed her of her body and her dignity!
Her fight or flight response is now edging toward fight.

d19d1d0d3030312c0c0072b3_29.t: Any pretense of innocence has now been cast aside. She snarls.
This was a reckoning. Holmes delivered justice!

d19d1d0d3030312c0c0072b3_30.t: Jessica appears puzzled, and just a little bit curious.
I can't say that I do.

d19d1d0d3030312c0c0072b3_32.t: Her posture changes ever so slightly, marked by the tensing of her muscles and a tightness around her eyes.
I could only hazard to guess.

d19d1d0d3030312c0c0072b3_34.t: Jessica's lip begins to curl and her eyes narrow.

Given Sam's appetites, it doesn't surprise me that he needed a new liver. And given the type of people he called friend, it doesn't surprise me that he would eventually face the consequences of those appetites, one way or another.

d19d1d0d3030312c0c0072b3_35.t: The last remnants of Jessica's mask fall to pieces and she glares venomously.
I am here to lay my mother to rest!

d19d1d0d3030312c0c0072b3_38.t: The last vestiges of Jessica's cool facade fall away and she practically spits her next words at you.

36bafa69306434fc04000a2c_8.t: Five or six? That’s not so bad. We have surprise on our side.

519a6506306434d0170045f4_0.t: Coyote’s face is pale and her voice is low, shaky.
What the hell was that back there, man? Just what the frag was that?

519a6506306434d0170045f4_2.t: Fine. Whatever. I want that woman dead now more than ever. If you go after her again, you think of me, okay? I’ll be around - locked and loaded.

51a7e86e623331b82a006dff_2.t: She looks down at her mangled arm.

51ad1ff43030317805001672_0.t: Coyote looks both better and worse than you last saw her. All the gaping holes are plugged and she's sporting a shiny new cyber-arm, but now that the adrenaline has worn off, it's clear she needs some rest.
Good... morning. Thanks to the miracle of modern science, combined with Doc Castle’s magical healing powers I’m almost good as new. Better, really.

51ad1ff43030317805001672_1.t: Thanks. Mrs. Kubota will have me working it off for the rest of my life.
You look like you’ve got something on your mind.

51ad1ff43030317805001672_2.t: She flashes you a puzzled look.

51ad1ff43030317805001672_7.t: I can’t say I’m surprised he’s dead. Sam was on a downward spiral for a long time. What can I tell you?

51ad1ff43030317805001672_12.t: Easy lover. No, it wasn’t like that. We were friends. I guess I knew him the best of everyone here. Sorry he’s gone.

51ad1ff43030317805001672_19.t: I like gingers. Anyway, Jake and Sam were having a few... well, Jake was having a few. Sam was tossing ‘em back but good. Eventually, he got loud, the way he sometimes did when he mixed drinking and who-knows-what and Mrs. Kubota wanted him ejected.

51ad1ff43030317805001672_21.t: Standard Sam drek. How he grew up rich and didn’t deserve this. How he hated his mother. How he loved his mother. It was pretty pathetic stuff.

51ad1ff43030317805001672_22.t: Enemies? That’s hard to say. Sam partied hard and when he did, he ran his mouth off pretty good. Got his ass kicked on more than one occasion. But no, I don’t think he had any enemies. At least none that I’m aware of.

51ad36533030317805001abd_2.t: Yeah, I did! He mentioned her once or twice. It didn't sound like they got along that well.
He was rambling on about her the last time I saw him. By that point, he was completely gone. I really couldn't follow what he was saying - but he sounded miserable.

51ad36533030317805001abd_19.t: Yeah, I think he did! He mentioned her once. It didn't sound like they got along that well.

51ae8290303031980d006758_0.t: When Coyote sees you, her eyes glisten with gratitude.
there they are - the man of the hour.

51ae8290303031980d006758_2.t: Hard to say. He’s pretty burnt. Malnourished and dehydrated too. Paco’s taking care of him. He’s got friends who know about that kind of thing.
He’s a good man, that Paco.

51ae8290303031980d006758_6.t: Hell yeah, I’m gonna be a runner. I *am* a runner, omae. I just play bartender to make ends meet.

51ae8290303031980d006758_7.t: Don’t get ahead of yourself, omae. Paco’s pretty and he’s been there for me when I needed him - but I don’t think I’m the marrying kind.

51ae8290303031980d006758_8.t: I’m good. I think I’m good. I’m done with BTL squats. Done with the crusade.

51ae8290303031980d006758_9.t: He’s taking care of Gino. He’s got friends who know about that kind of thing. He’s a good man, that Paco.

51ae8290303031980d006758_10.t: When Coyote sees you, her eyes glisten with gratitude.
There they are... the hero of the hour.

51ae8290303031980d006758_11.t: Coyote is wiping down the back bar. She doesn’t stop when you approach, keeps her eyes on her work.

51bd117f356164580b001757_2.t: Coyote is shaking. She looks horrified.

51bd117f356164580b001757_25.t: Coyote looks to you, tears in her eyes.

51bd117f356164580b001757_26.t: I’m not stopping. Not now, not ever.
She looks at Paco, then back at you.
A real rain is coming to Seattle - and it’s gonna wash the scum off the streets. I am going to burn every mother-fragging BTL shop in the Sprawl until they are GONE.

51d1b811623331f01b0054df_1.t: Hoi. You in the middle of something?

51d1b811623331f01b0054df_3.t: I don’t know if I ever told you this, but I was born in the Royale. BTL pushers like Stevie J ran the squats. Ran my world when I was growing up.

51d1b811623331f01b0054df_7.t: Her face lights up. She’s running hot. Has a serious edge.
I know exactly where he is this time. Got an old friend who eyeballed him herself. I’m on my way. Paco’s with me but we could use another hand. You in? I need you right now.

51d1b811623331f01b0054df_9.t: I got nothing, man. Call it a favor?

51d1b811623331f01b0054df_15.t: It was... for all kinds of reasons.

51d21a8f623331a019004926_0.t: Mrs. Kubota’s lips are tight and there appears to be a weight on her shoulders you haven’t seen before.
Have you seen Coyote, omae? She is late for another shift.

51d21a8f623331a019004926_1.t: Very well. I will cover the bar myself.

51d21a8f623331a019004926_2.t: There is no one else available tonight. She knows that. The two of us will have a long talk when I see her again...

51d21a8f623331a019004926_3.t: Mrs. Kubota declines her head. Stares at the floor. Breathes.

51d21a8f623331a019004926_5.t: It was her crusade, wasn’t it? Her private war on the BTL trade. Do not tell me it was a senseless shadowrun for some corporation who saw her as nothing more than a disposable asset.

51d233bf3561648412000a50_1.t: Coyote looks to you, tears in her eyes.

51d233bf3561648412000a50_2.t: I’m not stopping. Not now, not ever.
She looks at Paco. Back at you. The Angel of Death.
A real rain is coming to Seattle - and it’s gonna wash the scum off the streets. I am going to burn every mother-fragging BTL shop in the Sprawl until they are GONE.

51d35b06623331dc10005c56_4.t: Well, I’m gonna grab Paco, head back to the Union, maybe watch a trid or something. And I could use a long shower, too. After that...

51d35b06623331dc10005c56_6.t: Her jaw sets, her eyes harden, and she’s Coyote again.
Let them come. If the Yakuza wants me, they’re gonna find me. Nothing I can do about that. Some people choose to live in fear but not me. Not today.

51d35b06623331dc10005c56_8.t: She gets a twinkle in her eye.
Someday, maybe. When the rest of my body is made of metal too. But not today.

51d35b06623331dc10005c56_15.t: She looks back at the Universal Brotherhood.

51d4b39d633635641e003927_0.t: Your commlink chirps and Coyote appears on the screen.

51e071833963651821006cbf_2.t: No matter what, I don’t want any collateral damage in there. Shoot all the BTL pushers you want but no chip-heads die, if we can help it. Got it?

89e1a18b3064662c0a003e18_5.t: Jumping at the opportunity, Coyote follows your lead, pinning her captor's arms. You finish what you started and soon the ganger is convulsing in an interior reality of pain and terror.

fe66990a3064342c170018d0_1.t: She leans in, whispers in your ear.
This guy’s a clocker - trades work time for chips. Part salesman, part lookout. Probably has a signal device for the guys inside.

fe66990a3064342c170018d0_9.t: Coyote’s eyes are hard, her pupils tight little pinpricks of hate.
You do snuff too, don’t you?

235980d9303031c810006c7f_0.t: Your commlink chirps and the face of Baron Samedi fills the screen.
Together again, eh, mon ami? You and Samedi shall do great things this night! Great things!

39bd234430303170150042ca_0.t: Your commlink chrips and as expected, it's Baron Samedi.
From what I can see there is still is more information you need, mon ami! Best check James Telestrian's system while you still have the chance!

4445eb5f30303160150082a7_0.t: Your commlink screen flickers and the Baron appears.

They are moving fast. The Telestrian deckers have already regained control of the elevators to this level and several security teams have been dispatched. I suggest we find what we are looking for sooner rather than later. You must regain control over the elevators or else they will keep coming, to say nothing of getting out. Hurry!

51a4f5a9303031d40e00198d_9.t: His natural tone switches immediately to his Baron Samedi persona.
Ah, the lurker in the Matrix speaks! But you would do better to ask who SHE is. Alas, there is no time! This place is dangerous - you and Marie-Louise must get safely away. Then we will talk.

51b6591c3030319817004db9_0.t: The Baron appears on your commlink.

So! It appears that James has been making moves to secure his information. Not the actions of man who has nothing to hide, eh? We need to get upstairs to office and deck into his personal system. From here it looks like the elevators are on lock down. You will need to find a access point to deck in so we can continue.

51b7b7a73030315c1500470d_0.t: Your commlink chirps again and the Baron's face appears on screen. His voice is far less confident than before.

51c097313030317c11001ada_0.t: The image that suddenly lights up your commlink is clearly a non-standard transmission. Whoever it is, they’re using the Matrix to tight-beam their avatar’s face instead of their own. You can tell that the voice has been modulated to disguise it.
Bonsoir, mon ami! You must be careful with these devices - they can be hacked if you are not careful.

51c097313030317c11001ada_7.t: Suddenly, the Baron’s flowery speech is gone, and he’s all business.
Get to a secure jackpoint. Enter Shadowlands. I will meet you there. Bon voyage!
The Baron grins and his image flickers away.

ad0645a4303031dc0a003da4_0.t: Your commlink beings to ring, you pick up.

So these paintings must be what all those expensive deliveries were. We don't have much time. I am tracking Silverstar, and he is already stepping off the elevator. I don't think your disguise will hold up much longer. I'll update you on his movements... hurry, mon ami.

51c0a796623331f01b000735_0.t: The former runner stands near the door, appraising her bar. She appears worried in a way you haven’t seen before.

51c0a796623331f01b000735_1.t: Hai. There is something very wrong, yes.

51c0a796623331f01b000735_5.t: She purses her lips, clearly frustrated.
Thank you but I believe this is beyond the power of a shadowrunner to solve. It is about the power in bureaucracy. The small people live for the convenience of the rich.

51c0a796623331f01b000735_6.t: She purses her lips, clearly frustrated.
You are correct. It is about the power in bureaucracy. The small people live for the convenience of the rich.

51c0a796623331f01b000735_7.t: She purses her lips, clearly frustrated.
I believe this is beyond the power of mere money to solve. It is about the power in bureaucracy. The small people live for the convenience of the rich. One bribe cannot change a natural law.

51c0a796623331f01b000735_9.t: She smiles at your use of Japanese.
You are a good man, omae, and a friend of the Seamstresses Union. It is unfortunate that we do not have more friends like you.

51c0a796623331f01b000735_14.t: She looks you in the eye. Sighs.
I know, omae, I know. From what I have seen, working for your friend, Sam, has proven to be a bigger task than perhaps you thought.

51d2ff29623331b00f000753_16.t: Mrs. Kubota raises her hand and the conversation stops.
Wait. Before you go, there is one thing you did not tell us. Where is the Emerald City Ripper now?

57a2e124306434000d00432b_0.t: Mrs. Kubota watches you cross the room, sizing you up as you approach. As you get closer, you can see that she’s of mixed race - African and Japanese. Her demeanor says, “This is my house, mess with it at your peril.” but her eyes twinkle with a playful light when she speaks.

57a2e124306434000d00432b_1.t: My, but aren't you a big, powerful creature. Are you enjoying the Seamstresses Union? There should be plenty for someone like you to enjoy.

57a2e124306434000d00432b_2.t: My, but aren’t you the pretty elf! Are you enjoying the Seamstresses Union? There should be plenty for a man like you to enjoy.

57a2e124306434000d00432b_3.t: It is true what they say: "Good things come in small packages!" Are you enjoying the Seamstresses Union? There should be plenty for a man like you to enjoy.

57a2e124306434000d00432b_4.t: Konbanwa! Good evening! Are you enjoying the Seamstresses Union? There should be plenty for a man like you to enjoy.

57a2e124306434000d00432b_6.t: Tell me, omae - what is it you're looking for?

57a2e124306434000d00432b_9.t: Of course you are. Knowledge is power, neh?

57a2e124306434000d00432b_11.t: Ah! So, *you* are the "little insurance policy" he would go on about when he was drunk. His avenging angel who would strike back for him from beyond the grave.

57a2e124306434000d00432b_13.t: Her face clouds when you mention the Ripper.
Keep your voice down when you mention the Ripper, omae. He isn't good for business. Besides, I'm worried about my girl, Coyote. She's missing and I'm worried she may end up as his next victim.

57a2e124306434000d00432b_22.t: Would that I could. I have not seen her in two days.

7bba21d4623331c409007ace_0.t: Forgive me, omae, but you look like hell.

7bba21d4623331c409007ace_3.t: She looks you over, noting the signs of your nocturnal activities. She nods.
Any run you can walk away from is a good run.

7bba21d4623331c409007ace_7.t: That has been my experience as well. I am glad to have left the game.

8101e5483030312011004211_0.t: Her anger at Coyote's rashness slowly washes from her eyes and is replaced by tears. She sniffs, wipes them away, and inclines her head to you.

254028ef306434dc1000129c_0.t: Hovering over the recently-departed is a small dwarf, whistling a tune. His broad grin says "I love my job" a little more than you'd want or expect from someone in the chop shop trade. As you approach, he looks up with a lopsided grin. There’s something kindly in his eyes... though it might just be a stray reflection of chrome and surgical tools.

254028ef306434dc1000129c_3.t: And what makes you think I know anything about that?

254028ef306434dc1000129c_4.t: Interesting. A dead man makes for a strange client. But what makes you think he's here?

254028ef306434dc1000129c_5.t: He fixes you with a hard gaze.
Careful, friend. I can have Lone Star here in 2 minutes. Now, what makes you think I'd know anything about Sam Watts?

254028ef306434dc1000129c_8.t: The dwarf raises his eyebrows, a smile wiping the suspicion from his face.

449469043064342809005bdf_0.t: Towering over the diminutive coroner is a homicide detective right out of Central Casting - if you ignore the tusks, pointed ears, and neanderthal brow. You can smell his cheap aftershave from a mile away.

449469043064342809005bdf_3.t: C'mon, she offed herself... I had it on very good authority.

449469043064342809005bdf_9.t: The Lone Star detective finally notices you. You note his superhuman powers of observation.

449469043064342809005bdf_13.t: His face contorts in a hideous snarl.
You're funny, runner. Maybe we'll find another time to do a little dance later, you and me.

449469043064342809005bdf_15.t: He looks back at the dwarf.
Dresden, get me more. I am putting someone in a cell or a box THIS week and claiming my promotion!

51a4ff4a3561642414006e82_0.t: Want some advice, moron? Of course you don't. You're a shadowrunner and you live by your own rules, don'tcha?

51a4ff4a3561642414006e82_4.t: His eyes say, “I’d love to kill you now” but his mouth continues its smirk.
I got one of the richest an' most powerful men in the the Pacific Northwest takin’ care of me, dumbass. Wadda YOU got?

51a4ff4a3561642414006e82_6.t: Nooo. You go ahead in there and keep talkin’ trash. That should work out fine for you, drek-for-brains! You got no money and you got no power. So, what DO you got?

51a4ff4a3561642414006e82_8.t: His eyes widen. Then his smirk gets even broader.

That's the right attitude, chummer! You're just the same as Mr. Telestrian. Yes you are! The only difference is that you got no money and you got no power. So, tell me again, drek-for-brains. What is it you got?

51a9270830303154050016c9_0.t: Detective McKlusky stands smirking, surrounded by armed and twitchy Lone Star officers.

51a9270830303154050016c9_1.t: That's right, dummy. Keep flapping your jaw. That sort of thing will be perfect for where you're going.

51a9270830303154050016c9_2.t: What I want is to take you into an alley and come out alone. But there's someone who wants to meet you, so we're going for a little ride.

51a9270830303154050016c9_3.t: You really that dumb, dummy? Do you know who I work for? The same guy whose building you just broke into.

51a9270830303154050016c9_5.t: Come on, drek-for-brains. Make the wrong choice.

51d34f96623331dc10005876_0.t: McKlusky’s alternating between trying to look important and trying to avoid actual work.
What are you looking at, choob?

51d34f96623331dc10005876_1.t: McKlusky beams, then his brow furrows.
I did? I didn’t hear about it.

657c88356233311830004b4f_0.t: She looks up, watching you warily.

657c88356233311830004b4f_1.t: The suspicion in her voice and eyes departs almost instantly when the subject turns to the deceased.
He's my brother. I... I've been trying to speak with him.

657c88356233311830004b4f_4.t: Not so far as I can tell. Not among the living anyway.
Realization then dawns, bringing the light back into her eyes.

657c88356233311830004b4f_5.t: But my brother's spirit may not be alone here this night.

657c88356233311830004b4f_6.t: Yes... There are others... Other spirits who may be of help.
Her features harden in frustration, as if she's searching for something that remains elusive. Sighing, she opens her eyes and fixes you with a stare.

657c88356233311830004b4f_11.t: A spirit is but an echo, and my brother's is in a very fragile state.
Her brow then furrows with a sudden thought.

657c88356233311830004b4f_12.t: She looks at you, the flattery largely failing to affect her, given the circumstances. But then inspiration dispels the dark cloud surrounding her.
Perhaps. My brother's spirit is too weak. That's a given.

657c88356233311830004b4f_13.t: She glares at you for a moment and you can see pain in her eyes, along with something else. Power.
He's my brother, and I'm trying to learn from him the identity of his killer.

657c88356233311830004b4f_14.t: Yes. He's my older brother. I've asked Bear to help me speak to him...
She shakes her head, looking like one who has found herself lost for the first time in her life.

657c88356233311830004b4f_17.t: You hand her the objects you've found. She closes her eyes and chants over them for a time. When her eyes open again, they're filled with tears.
Thank you. These items are all I will need. It shouldn't take me long to--

5199765e62333104060047c2_1.t: Hey, I'm already at "shoot on sight" status with these guys. Killing John Paul means one less 'Weener to shoot me in the back while I'm buying smokes. Hell - they'll be doing the same to you as soon as there's a profit in it.

51d4c256623331ac180039b4_0.t: Jake shakes his head smirking as you approach. When you finally get close, he breaks out laughing.

51d4c256623331ac180039b4_2.t: He scratches his mop of red hair.

51d4c256623331ac180039b4_15.t: He slides his sunglasses down his nose. Cyber-eyes.
Sounds like there’s a story there.

a45289676233311c0a003dd3_3.t: Well, so much for a good night’s sleep. On the plus side, I noticed you haven’t killed me yet, so... that’s good. If you aren’t after me, then what’s your story?

a45289676233311c0a003dd3_5.t: Jake yells towards the other side of the room.

a45289676233311c0a003dd3_7.t: He pauses. Might be sizing you up, but it’s hard to tell behind those shades.

a45289676233311c0a003dd3_9.t: Damn. Maybe I need some soykaf after all. John, could you grab me a cup?

a45289676233311c0a003dd3_11.t: Thanks John, you’re a real pal. Anyway, there’s a big fat corp bounty on my head. Like I said, my last job didn’t exactly go according to plan. Out in the alley, a few Halloweeners got the jump on us. Damn gangers thought they could turn a quick profit off of my head.
Jake smiles, and you get the impression that didn’t work out so well for the gangers.

a45289676233311c0a003dd3_15.t: I’ll hold you to that, John. Anyway, they found Sam’s body less than a block away from the Union, missing liver and all.

a45289676233311c0a003dd3_17.t: In return, I’ll take you to the place Sam was murdered. It’s not safe to hit these streets alone at night, trust me.

a45289676233311c0a003dd3_35.t: I know they found his body a block away from the Union, just lying there in broad daylight. That’s the Barrens for you.

Shame though. Wish I’d been there. If those slaggin’ gangers hadn’t come along...

d6d0841b303031800f00696c_7.t: Jake grabs the dead man by the throat. At first it looks like he’s trying to kill him again, and then you notice he’s feeling for something under the skin.

d6d0841b303031800f00696c_8.t: You watch as Jake pulls out his modified PDA and slots the chip.

51d08af43236646019001e47_5.t: Doctor Castle pauses in her work, setting down her tablet and appearing to grow introspective.

51d08af43236646019001e47_10.t: She picks up her tablet and resumes her work.
Is there anything else I can help you with?

51d08b363236646019001e5e_0.t: Doc Castle looks to be better rested and in better spirits than the last time you saw her. She's also clearly had a shower and a change of clothes, maybe even some sleep. Her eyes are sharp when they turn up from her work to greet you.

51d08b363236646019001e5e_4.t: Doctor Castle sets down her work and fixes you with a hard look. Her expression normally falls on an axis of varying degrees of indifference, depending on her level of tiredness. But now, it has shifted over to something decidedly darker.

51d08b363236646019001e5e_11.t: She picks up her tablet and resumes her work.

51d08b6e3236646019001e67_0.t: For once, Dr. Castle is not utterly absorbed in her work. In fact, she seems to have set aside whatever she's doing to give you her full attention. Perhaps word has spread about what you've already faced and what is still to come.

8f6016893030312816002741_1.t: The doctor herself is an unassuming sort, perhaps the type to go unnoticed entirely, if not for the spritely spirit perched on her shoulder like her own personal gargoyle. 8f6016893030312816002741_5.t: She notes you eyeballing the facilities.

8f6016893030312816002741_12.t: Doc Castle gives you a final once-over, noting your gear.
I'm sure we'll see each other again.

26bf5777306466ec210018c0_0.t: The woman scratches herself like a cat at a couch leg.

26bf5777306466ec210018c0_3.t: She drops to her knees, pleading.

26bf5777306466ec210018c0_4.t: But... but that doesn't make sense. The BTLs are here! I just... need... something...

51bcdf80356164580b00167e_2.t: Nope. I’m good. See you on the way out.

51bd117f356164580b001757_3.t: Gino looks at her with glazed eyes. No recognition.
Slot me back in, goddamnit! This is bullshit! I don’t wanna be here anymore. SLOT ME BACK IN!

51bd117f356164580b001757_6.t: Gino wrenches his wrist from Coyote’s grasp and he staggers back, reaches under his shirt and pulls out a gun. Coyote watches him, horrified, with tears in her eyes. Gino waves it around, blinking wildly.

51bd117f356164580b001757_8.t: He presses his hands to the sides of his head, his finger still on the trigger. Squints.

51bd117f356164580b001757_10.t: This is the way you help me?! Look at this place! Look at ME!

51bd117f356164580b001757_11.t: He looks at Coyote. Looks at you.

51bd117f356164580b001757_14.t: He presses his hands to the sides of his head, his finger still on the trigger. Squints.
I... no. No, I gotta slot back in. Get away from this drek.

51bd117f356164580b001757_15.t: It’s real to me! I can smell it! Touch it! I can fragging taste it! I was a god in there... king. I was a KING! Can you imagine it?

51bd117f356164580b001757_18.t: He looks around at the squalor of the room, then glimpses his own reflection in the machinery.

51bd117f356164580b001757_21.t: Why would I want to touch this drek?! This sewer! I was a god in there... king. I was a KING! Can you imagine it?
He looks around the room. Sees the squalor. The bodies. Then he glimpses his own pitiful reflection in the machinery.

51bd117f356164580b001757_28.t: No! You don’t... you can’t understand what it’s like out here! I’m naked. I gotta slot in... get away.

You’re not gonna stop me! I’ll fragging kill you first!

51cf382f356164d015000125_0.t: Coyote stops you for a moment.

51cf382f356164d015000125_4.t: Not us, not anyone in the Sprawl. But they’re chip-heads not pushers. They have a problem. They didn’t ask for this.

51d2149c3561648412000459_5.t: She looks at you, her scarred face soft.

51d2149c3561648412000459_6.t: She looks at you, her scarred face hard.

I'm *telling you* it's only a matter of time! She and her crew took took out Stevie J's place. We need to put some security cameras and a door guard with two good eyes!

51e071833963651821006cbf_1.t: A new voice, with the heavy digitization of someone with a lot of cyber, calmly interjects.

51e071833963651821006cbf_4.t: Not us, not anyone in the Sprawl. But they’re chip-heads not pushers. They have a problem. They didn’t ask for this.

51e07b343963651821006dd2_2.t: The man with the cyberdeck calmly speaks with a heavily digitized voice.
You messed with the wrong BTL Lab, aho. This is a Yakuza operation. With a push of a button, I can make these tweakers into my own personal killer puppets. You're fragged.

519a60ad306434d0170044ad_0.t: The magic dealer's area is abuzz with chaotic activity as you watch the contents of a dozen boxes fly through the air. 519a60ad306434d0170044ad_3.t: The elf's face curls into a grimace.
I'm sorry. I find the very thought repugnant.

519a60ad306434d0170044ad_6.t: So you can understand why I find the idea of an insect totem so foreign. To what quality would a shaman aspire in such a case?
A chill visibly runs through him.

51a505913561642414006f72_0.t: There is a twinkle in Aljernon’s eye that wasn’t there when you spoke at the Seamstresses Union.
It is good to see you again. There is much to do.

51a7b5663561644c0e006fd9_45.t: Bravo. That is precisely the idea. The insect spirit exists on both planes simultaneously.

51a8bde6356164d017006e96_3.t: His eyes widen at the question.

51a8bde6356164d017006e96_4.t: Aljernon's face takes on a dreamy expression.
Are any of us? Yes, I am here. And at the Seamstresses Union. And a myriad of other places. On to the work at hand. Do you require my magic?

51d03f9b32366460190018c8_0.t: The elf called Aljernon appears to be in a hushed but intense conversation as you approach. However, the other party of this discourse is nowhere to be seen. Turning to greet you, Aljernon dismisses his invisible associate with a wave of his hand.

51d0575f3236646019001961_0.t: Aljernon stands stock still, his eyes closed and his face composed in a mask of stern concentration. But then a small snore escapes his nose, instantly shattering the elf's carefully manicured mystique. A clearing of your throat is enough to rouse the talismonger from his "meditation".

8f9521f16233318c24006f01_0.t: Aljernon looks the same as always. So much so that one may wonder if he ever takes time to eat or sleep. Perhaps his presence on this plane of existence is insubstantial enough that he isn't subject to such base needs. Or perhaps he just does these things when no one is looking.

8f9521f16233318c24006f01_4.t: Aljernon takes a hard look at you for what may be the first time. But this is the hard look of a magician, whose eyes pierce the veil of reality and burrow through a man's soul.

8f9521f16233318c24006f01_6.t: Shaking his head, Aljernon opens his clasped hands to you, as if begging forgiveness.
Too often this world leaves us confounded. I pray I have not left you in such a state with my idle musings.

8f9521f16233318c24006f01_8.t: Aljernon smiles at you, much as a parent smiles at an overconfident child.
On the contrary, spirits are the very essence of the natural world. They are born of land, sea, and sky. They are born of Man and beast and plant.

9035fd4c3030312816002a32_0.t: Past the bar, the edges of the safe house become somewhat indistinct due to the magical haze surrounding a particular elf. The man seems only half of this realm, his mind wandering the far horizons of astral space while his body peddles his otherworldly wares.

ae12dd5b306434681700440e_0.t: Father Willy's greasy black hair and disturbing tattoos are quite the contrast to the flawless features and exquisite clothes of Lynne Telestrian. Welcome, my friend from the shadows. I rejoice to be with you.

ae12dd5b306434681700440e_15.t: What would Grandmother Jessica have to do with such grisly business?

ae12dd5b306434681700440e_33.t: Father Willy has been knocked unconscious by the chloroform.

ae12dd5b306434681700440e_35.t: The Father's uniform doesn't fit you

ae12dd5b306434681700440e_36.t: You change into the Universal Brotherhood uniform

ae12dd5b306434681700440e_38.t: He looks around anxiously and then calms down.
Very funny. Now get back to work or I will report you to the head of maintenance for wasting my time.

26ed5b3a306466b40a0018d7_4.t: Hey, you're not leaving me down here!

80ca29c43064347c17005537_18.t: Few days back, I heard Mr. Delilah was looking for runners to steal some sorta item out from under Stevie J's nose. She must've taken the job - I'm sure of it. And if his thugs caught her...

I'm going over there. You comin'?

80ca29c43064347c17005537_23.t: Fine. But that better be it. Now let's get moving - the Royale is just a few blocks from here.

80ca29c43064347c17005537_24.t: Of course I know my way around a fight. Stevie J better be ready for a world of hurt.
Paco curls his hand into a fist.
Now let's get moving - the Royale is just a few blocks from here.

Oh... oh no. Is that Coyote?? This isn't happening. God damn it!

810fe662306434ec16003207_1.t: Paco steps forward and breathes a huge sigh of relief.
No... no. It's not her. Thank God.

810fe662306434ec16003207_2.t: Look, let's not hang out here too long, alright? Too many Lone Star pigs around.

It's too bad, whatever happened here... I'm not going to let anything like this happen to Coyote.

c54275fb3064666021001882_0.t: The Royale Apartments. What a hole. Can't imagine what it was like for Coyote, growing up here...

42e86734623331e0170026ed_3.t: One particular pediatrician's entry stands out from the rest.

42e86734623331e0170026ed_4.t: Child suffers from a chronic depression and social anxiety most likely caused by his physical abnormalities. We've seen many cases like this recently, with the outbreak of changeling children being born. With the aberrant physiology we're seeing there is no telling what sort of brain functions are affected. Prescribed a series of sedatives last year that seemed to have no effect. Upping the dosage.

42e86734623331e0170026ed_6.t: The file is quite large and takes well over an hour to read through. The final entry, however, is the most significant. It is written by Doctor Henry Holmes.

42e86734623331e0170026ed_7.t: Silas has overcome significant mental disorders and no longer goes through periods of violent episodes. Latest medications have proven especially effective but I believe that being treated by another elf has significantly impacted his treatment. Unfortunately, my efforts to maintain an emotional boundary with him have proven challenging. He has bonded to me in an unhealthy and frankly an unnerving way. His hero-worship exhibits itself in the form of mimicked speech patterns and adopting my dress. For this reason and for the health of the patient, I am assigning another doctor to his case. I will inform him at his next session.
